name: ws
description: Manage branch-scoped working sets of files. Pairs with the ws CLI tool.

commands.name: ws:map
commands.description: Search codebase for files related to a feature and add them to working set

commands.name: ws:add
commands.description: Add files to the current branch's working set

commands.name: ws:remove
commands.description: Remove a file from the working set

commands.name: ws:open
commands.description: Open the ws TUI to view and navigate your working set

commands.name: ws:list
commands.description: List all files in the current working set

commands.name: ws:clear
commands.description: Clear all files from the current branch's working set

commands.name: ws:install
commands.description: Install the ws CLI tool (detects OS and package manager)
